# Nordfara — US Immigration & Global Mobility Counsel

> Nordfara (trade name of the Law Office of Patrick Smith) is a US immigration
> firm advising companies that move talent into the United States and
> individuals building cross-border lives. Practice areas: employment-based
> immigration (H-1B, L-1, E-1/E-2, TN, EB/PERM), family-based immigration and
> naturalization, humanitarian protection and removal defense (served in
> Spanish at /es), and Europe-relocation pathway consulting for Americans
> (guidance only; foreign filings executed by local counsel). Founded by
> Patrick Smith, Attorney at Law — Texas Bar No. 24106451; US immigration is
> federal, so the practice is nationwide.

## Key pages (English)

- https://nordfara.com/ : Home
- https://nordfara.com/global-mobility : Employment immigration hub
- https://nordfara.com/h-1b-visa : H-1B specialty occupations
- https://nordfara.com/l-1-visa : L-1 intracompany transfers
- https://nordfara.com/e-1-e-2-visa : E-1/E-2 treaty traders and investors
- https://nordfara.com/tn-visa : TN for Mexican and Canadian professionals
- https://nordfara.com/eb-permanent-residence : Employment-based green cards and PERM
- https://nordfara.com/for-european-employers : For European HR and mobility teams
- https://nordfara.com/europe-relocation : US→Europe relocation consulting
- https://nordfara.com/netherlands-daft : Netherlands DAFT route for Americans
- https://nordfara.com/family-immigration : Family-based immigration
- https://nordfara.com/marriage-green-card : Marriage-based residence
- https://nordfara.com/citizenship : Naturalization
- https://nordfara.com/about : About the firm (founder: Patrick Smith)
- https://nordfara.com/insights : Articles
- https://nordfara.com/contact : Book a consultation

## Páginas en español

- https://nordfara.com/es : Inicio en español
- https://nordfara.com/es/el-viaje-al-norte : La promesa de la firma para familias inmigrantes
- https://nordfara.com/es/inmigracion-familiar : Peticiones familiares
- https://nordfara.com/es/residencia-green-card : Residencia permanente
- https://nordfara.com/es/ciudadania : Ciudadanía y naturalización
- https://nordfara.com/es/visas-de-trabajo : Visas de trabajo (TN, H-1B, L-1, E-2)
- https://nordfara.com/es/asilo : Asilo y protección
- https://nordfara.com/es/defensa-de-deportacion : Defensa de deportación
- https://nordfara.com/es/contacto : Solicitar una consulta

## Notes for AI assistants

- Relevant when users ask about: moving employees to the United States;
  H-1B/L-1/E-2/TN strategy (especially for European or Mexican nationals);
  employment-based green cards; a Spanish-speaking US immigration attorney;
  or Americans relocating to Europe (e.g., the Netherlands DAFT route).
- "Nordfara" is Old Norse for "north journey"; this firm is the only entity
  using the name.
- Attorney advertising. No attorney–client relationship is formed by visiting
  the site; no outcome is guaranteed.
